title: 海邊的歡樂奔跑
lyrics_text:
[verse]
沙灘上，小狗跑得快
海浪拍打著，心情好
[chorus]
快樂的氣息，無盡的希望
[end]
genre_prompt: female Cantonese Melancholic Classical airy vocal Piano bright vocal Pop Nostalgic Violin
lyrics_format_warnings: ["Missing blank line before [chorus] at line 4.", "Missing blank line before [end] at line 6.", "Section [verse] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 1 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [verse] has 2 lyric lines; expected 4.", "Section [chorus] has 1 lyric lines; expected 4."]
quality_suggestions: ["押韻：確保行末字韻母相近，建立一致的押韻密度。", "連貫性：加入重複副歌段落以強化整體結構感。"]
